payload.label: bed
payload.long_description: Well-made bed with beige-and-gray horizontal striped sheets and two matching pillows, backed by a dark brown wooden paneled headboard; mattress surface fills most of the crop and appears flat and neatly arranged, with nightstands and a lamp visible at the sides. The front of the bed is approximately 1.5 meters from the camera.
